items.text: 好了，让我们来完成一次精加工，并整理一下场景中的一些细节 Alright, so let's go through a polished pass and a couple things that we can tidy up in our scene 让它看起来更逼真一些，并用简单的方法改善我们的照明。 to make it look a little bit more photorealistic and improve our lighting in simple ways. 还可以添加一些简单的氛围效果。 And also add some simple atmospheric effects. 我们将在下一章深入探讨渲染设置、 And we'll dive into the render settings in the next chapter, 但有一件事我想让你知道，你现在应该已经通过你的渲染图注意到了、 but one thing that I want you to know, you should probably have noticed it by now through your renders, 但如果将我的视口与我的进度渲染进行比较、 but if I compare my viewport to my progress renders, 我可以看到，通过电影渲染队列渲染出来的水面倒影效果更好。 and I can see that the reflections of the water look a lot better out of my renders through Movie Render Queue. 但这里最大的问题是，我们只想确保，无论我们正在研究什么 But the big issue here is that we just want to make sure that whatever we're looking at 与我们从电影渲染队列中得到的结果直接匹配。 in our viewport directly matches what we're getting out of Movie Render Queue. 那么，这两者之间有什么区别呢？ So what's the difference between these two? 这是虚幻引擎中一种叫做可扩展性设置的东西。 It's something called scalability settings inside of Unreal Engine. 所以，如果你去右上角点击这里的设置、 So if you go to the top right and click on the settings here, 然后转到 "引擎可扩展性设置"、 and then go down to Engine Scalability Settings, 这就像在 PC 上玩视频游戏时的渲染设置一样、 this is just like render settings when you're playing a video game on PC, 在这里您可以选择低、中、高或史诗级质量设置。 where you can select low, medium, high, or epic quality settings. 这就是它所要求的，当你从 "电影渲染队列 "中渲染出来时、 This is what it's asking for, and when you render out of Movie Render Queue, 你总是能呈现出电影级的画质。 you're always rendering in cinematic quality. 因此，在您的视口中，虚幻总是默认为史诗级质量、 So Unreal always defaults to epic quality in your viewport, 但在 "电影渲染队列 "中，我们的反射效果会更好、 which is still very, very good, but our reflections are going to look better in Movie Render Queue, 但在使用电影属性时，时间会稍长一些。 but they're going to take a little bit longer when using cinematic properties. 不过，让我们在视口中打开它，然后就能看到不同之处了。 But let's turn that on in our viewport, and then we'll start to see the difference. 我们将获得可扩展性更新，现在我们可以从岩石上看到我们的倒影了、 We'll get that scalability update, and now we can see our reflections from the rocks, 它们看起来好多了。 and they're looking a lot lighting, 并与我们的奇幻艺术风格相吻合，就像《拉亚与最后的龙》一样。 and fit in with our fantasy art style that Raya and the Last Dragon has. 因此，让我们在这里添加一些点光源。 So let's go under here and add in some point lights. 我们以后可以把这些变成聚光灯、 We can always turn these into spotlights later, 不过，把这些东西拖来拖去，看看什么样的光线方向会更有趣，还是很不错的、 but it's nice to drag these around and see what sort of light direction can be interesting, 然后，我们就可以在稍后将其标记出来，这样就不会碰壁了。 and then we can always flag this off later so it doesn't hit our brick wall. 事实上，你知道吗？ In fact, you know what? 我要把这个换成聚光灯、 I'm going to change this over to a spotlight, 因为如果我们把它保留为点光源，它就会一直照亮后墙、 just because it's going to always light up that back wall if we keep it as a point light, 我们真的很想让所有的光线都从后墙照射到树上。 and we really want to keep all of the light off of the back never hitting our back wall, 您可以在这里看到。 as you can see here. 但这样一来，我们就能像这样在树后和树上洒下一些灯光、 But this way, we can throw some lights behind and up at our trees like this, 就像你晚上在花园里看到的一样、 like you might see 差别是很难察觉的。 It's very imperceptible what the difference will be. 但要禁用投射阴影、 But by disabling cast shadows, 这让灯光的渲染速度非常非常快。 it makes this light really, really fast to render. 但每次都会有投射阴影的光线、 But every time you have a light with cast shadows, 很快就会累加起来。 it does quickly start to add up. 因此，一旦达到 15 至 20 盏灯的亮度范围、 So once you've hit that 15 to 20 light range, 它真的会让你的机器瘫痪。 it can really bring your machine to a crawl. 因此，无论何时，都要牢记这一点。 So that's something to keep in mind whenever you can. 如果不需要，只需禁用灯光上的投射阴影即可。 Just disable those cast shadows on your lights if you don't need it. 尤其是在添加微小细节灯的时候 Especially when
